title: symphyotrichum ontarionis var. glabratum
intro: Symphyotrichum ontarionis var. glabratum, also known as Smooth New England Aster, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the daisy family, known for its vibrant purple flowers and silvery-gray foliage. The plant has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, burns, and skin irritations. The smooth New England Aster has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
